title: Emit Kubernetes Events for key lifecycle transitions
summary: Review of changes addressing external review #1 feedback from berendt. All 5 feedback items (3 warnings, 2 infos) were properly addressed: W-001 extracted shared expectEvent/expectNoEvent test helpers into event_helpers_test.go replacing 37 inline assertion blocks; W-002 replaced 12 inline event reason string literals in reconcile_database.go with conditionReason* constants (10 existing + 4 new); W-003 added Chainsaw E2E test under tests/e2e/keystone/events/ validating BootstrapComplete event emission on a real cluster; I-001 standardized arrow encoding to \u2192 across all files; I-002 removed all CC-0070 ticket-reference comments from test code. Tests pass, go vet clean, no security issues.

tests_checklist.item: Event emission tested for happy path via expectEvent helper
No-event assertions for polling/in-progress states via expectNoEvent helper
E2E test validates BootstrapComplete event on real cluster via field-selector
Test helpers extracted to shared event_helpers_test.go — no inline FakeRecorder casts remain

code_quality_checklist.item: Shared test helpers follow cross-cutting helpers pattern (dedicated file, same package)
conditionReason* constants used for event reasons that have condition counterparts
Arrow encoding standardized to \u2192 across all files
No CC-0070 ticket-reference comments in test code
SPDX headers on all new files

security_checklist.item: Event messages contain only operator-controlled strings (image tags, version numbers, job names) — no user input injection risk
No hardcoded secrets or sensitive data in events
gosec reports no issues on changed files

architecture_checklist.item: E2E test follows Chainsaw test suite structure pattern (SPDX header, REQ references, 5m timeout, numbered steps, catch blocks)
E2E fixture uses unique CR name (keystone-events) and database (keystone_events) for parallel execution
Test helper file naming (event_helpers_test.go) is descriptive and package-scoped

dry_yagni_checklist.item: 37 inline FakeRecorder assertion blocks replaced by 2 shared helpers — significant duplication reduction
No unnecessary abstractions added beyond what was requested

fail_fast_checklist.item: E2E test Step 3 fails immediately if BootstrapComplete event is absent

defensive_checklist.item: expectEvent/expectNoEvent perform type assertion on FakeRecorder safely (test-only code)

suggested_improvements: 3 event reasons in reconcile_database.go remain as inline strings ("ExpandFailed" L378, "MigrateFailed" L409, "ContractFailed" L450) while 12 others use conditionReason* constants. These don't duplicate existing constants (their condition counterparts are dynamically constructed via phase+"Failed" in setUpgradeJobFailed), so they were correctly outside W-002 scope. For full alerting stability, consider adding conditionReasonExpandFailed/MigrateFailed/ContractFailed constants in a follow-up. Same applies to "DeploymentRolloutComplete" in reconcile_deployment.go:106.

The E2E test asserts only BootstrapComplete. A future enhancement could also assert DatabaseSynced, FernetKeysGenerated, and CredentialKeysGenerated events for broader E2E coverage of the event emission feature.
